name: pb-graphiti
description: Shared temporal knowledge graph (Graphiti + Neo4j) wired as an MCP server. Gives Claude Code a cross-session, cross-project memory tier separate from per-project file-based auto-memory. Consumer must run the bundled docker-compose stack on the host before the MCP becomes reachable.

graphiti_url.title: Graphiti MCP URL
graphiti_url.description: Where to reach the Graphiti MCP server. Default http://localhost:8765/mcp works when Claude Code runs on the same host as the docker-compose stack (the common case). For Claude Code running inside a container (DDEV, devcontainer, etc.), change to http://host.docker.internal:8765/mcp. Note: NO trailing slash — the server 307-redirects /mcp/ to /mcp and most MCP HTTP clients do not follow POST redirects.
